summary: Complete testing of Sri by Mahakali Tribunal platform - all 12 requested changes verified. Backend API tests (13/13 passed), Frontend UI tests all passed.
passed_tests: ✅ Landing page hero subtitle: 'World's First Capital Formation Tool for Entrepreneurs providing global & round the clock access to both Investors and Businesses.'
✅ Landing page CTA buttons: 'Explore Investment Thesis' and 'How It Works' (not 'Theses' or 'Governance Charter')
✅ Navbar shows 'Pricing' link for logged-out users
✅ Navbar shows 'Pricing' link for logged-in users
✅ Navbar shows 'Create Thesis' link for business/founder users
✅ /pricing page loads with Founder and Investor tabs
✅ Founder pricing shows CHF amounts (CHF 260, CHF 525, CHF 1,575)
✅ Investor pricing shows 0.25% trading fees and CHF 25 Pro Analytics
✅ /explore page shows Create Thesis and Create Company buttons for business users
✅ Thesis editor has Video URL and Pitch Deck URL input fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 requested changes have been implemented and verified. Email verification is MOCKED (logs to console, no Resend API key). Razorpay payments are MOCKED (architecture ready but disabled without keys). The platform uses singular 'Thesis' instead of 'Theses' throughout.
